summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for Phase 1 Tournaments module. All 29 tests passed (100%). Tournament CRUD, registration flow, admin controls, and existing league/auth regression tests all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Tournament router is well-structured with proper admin/user separation
All endpoints correctly use get_current_user dependency for auth
is_super_admin check works correctly via database lookup in get_current_user middleware
Validation for max_participants = groups_count * players_per_group is working
Registration prevents duplicates and handles unregistration properly
Group generation requires exact number of participants (may need flexibility for partial starts)
Note: is_super_admin is NOT returned in login response but exists in DB - this is by design
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed tournaments created during tests. Existing tournament ID f5177cbd-29bf-4974-8046-e4d4a898531c was used for read-only tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Tournament backend is complete and working. Test coverage includes: POST /api/tournaments (admin creates), POST /api/tournaments/{id}/open (opens registration), GET /api/tournaments (lists non-drafts), GET /api/tournaments/{id} (detail), POST /api/tournaments/{id}/register (user registers), DELETE /api/tournaments/{id}/register (user unregisters), POST /api/tournaments/{id}/start (generates groups - requires max_participants), GET /api/tournaments/{id}/groups (standings), POST /api/tournaments/{id}/rounds (creates round), POST /api/tournaments/{id}/rounds/{id}/open (opens for predictions). Auth regression and league regression all passing.

tested_endpoints_summary.POST /api/tournaments: PASS - Admin creates tournament, non-admin gets 403, validation for participant count
tested_endpoints_summary.POST /api/tournaments/{id}/open: PASS - Opens registration, fails if not draft, requires admin
tested_endpoints_summary.GET /api/tournaments: PASS - Lists tournaments (excludes drafts), enriches with registration info
tested_endpoints_summary.GET /api/tournaments/{id}: PASS - Returns full detail with groups and rounds
tested_endpoints_summary.POST /api/tournaments/{id}/register: PASS - User registers, duplicate gets 400, requires auth
tested_endpoints_summary.DELETE /api/tournaments/{id}/register: PASS - User unregisters, 404 if not registered
tested_endpoints_summary.POST /api/tournaments/{id}/start: PASS - Requires admin, requires max_participants registered
tested_endpoints_summary.GET /api/tournaments/{id}/groups: PASS - Returns group standings (empty if not started)
tested_endpoints_summary.POST /api/tournaments/{id}/rounds: PASS - Requires admin, fails if not in groups/knockout status
